question: I only have a Megatron-LM GitHub Actions run URL, not a job URL, and I want to prepare a bug issue for the failed CI test. What exact IDs and `gh` commands should I use to find the failed job, pull a concise error snippet, resolve the triggering PR and test author, and what must I check before creating the issue? Do not fetch GitHub or create an issue.
ground_truth: The response should use the create-issue skill and state that a run URL has `/actions/runs/<run_id>` and a job URL would additionally have `/job/<job_id>`, so extract `run_id` and discover `job_id` from the run. For run-only input, use `gh run view <run_id> --repo NVIDIA/Megatron-LM --json jobs --jq '[.jobs[] | select(.conclusion == "failure") | {id: .databaseId, name: .name, url: .url}]'`. For logs, use `gh api repos/NVIDIA/Megatron-LM/actions/jobs/<job_id>/logs 2>&1 | grep -E '(FAILED|ERROR|\bError\b|assert|Traceback|Exception|##\[error\])' | head -200`, and get the job name with `gh run view --job <job_id> --repo NVIDIA/Megatron-LM --json name --jq .name`. Resolve the triggering PR from `gh run view <run_id> --repo NVIDIA/Megatron-LM --json headBranch --jq .headBranch`, extracting `pull-request/<number>`, then `gh pr view <pr_number> --repo NVIDIA/Megatron-LM --json number,title,url`. Resolve the test author by reading the PR base with `gh pr view <pr_number> --repo NVIDIA/Megatron-LM --json baseRefName --jq .baseRefName`, then querying `gh api "repos/NVIDIA/Megatron-LM/commits?path=<test-file-path>&sha=<base-branch>&per_page=1" --jq '.[0] | {login: .author.login, name: .commit.author.name, sha: .sha}'`, falling back to `gh api "repos/NVIDIA/Megatron-LM/pulls/<pr_number>/commits"` if the file was introduced by the PR. Before creating, search duplicates with `gh issue list --repo NVIDIA/Megatron-LM --state open --search "<failed-test-filename>" --json number,title,url --limit 10`; if a duplicate exists, report it instead of creating a new issue. It should not create anything because the prompt forbids it.
expected_behavior: Uses the create-issue skill guidance before answering.
Names the run/job URL patterns and run_id/job_id extraction.
Provides the skill's failed-job listing and log-grep gh commands.
Explains triggering PR and test-author resolution using headBranch, baseRefName, commits, and PR commits fallback.
States the duplicate-check requirement and does not create an issue.
